title: Assorted Frogs
description: The pack for all your Frogs!
body:
![Behold](https://i.imgur.com/8FzB5ZN.png)

***

Assorted Frogs is the perfect pack for your Frogs, bringing many custom variants to spruce up the swamp life!

![banner](https://i.imgur.com/FWdmPSb.png)

![Addon](https://imgur.com/oYpzoJf.png)

***

This pack requires the mentioned features marked below:

![Optifine or EMF/ETF](https://i.imgur.com/MS5KZjL.png)

![Features](https://i.imgur.com/AfRhw7z.png93483284/1086427548889657395/Features.png)

***

These mob variants can all be renamed to their appropriate skins and spawn naturally. All natural frogs are based and named on real life and spawn frequently, while special frogs spawn rarely! This pack is formatted to make it easy to create addons!

![FrogThumbnail](https://i.imgur.com/Ft8J4Ec.png)

![Notes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7a79e9eb639b944902b08f1e240840069723570.png)

***

This pack wouldn't be possible if it weren't for the following:

*   Butterd
*   ShinyDragon
*   Aurora


![](https://i.imgur.com/6mb4QDE.png)

***
